provenance.notes: Original contract source and deployed Ethereum mainnet address are verified. Acclimated/ERC-721 contract address is verified from marketplace URLs and live Etherscan checks, but its Etherscan page still needs a registered source entry.

contracts.label: MoonCatRescue contract
contracts.notes: Original MoonCatRescue contract. Address verified from registered Etherscan source; source code verified from the original repository/raw Solidity source and Etherscan source-code badge.

contracts.label: Acclimated MoonCats contract
contracts.notes: ERC-721/ERC-998 acclimated wrapper contract. Address appears in registered marketplace/project links and was verified live on Etherscan. The Etherscan source shows MoonCatAcclimator wraps original MoonCats and mints tokenId equal to rescue order. Add a source entry for this Etherscan page in a follow-up before treating sourceRefs as complete.
